note: Public demo inputs are fetched at runtime, pinned to a dataset commit revision, and verified by sha256. Raw contents are written under examples/public-traces/ (git-ignored) and are never vendored into the repo.

trace-commons.license_note: Trace Commons compilation is documented as CC-BY-4.0. Individual trace contents may carry original licenses; reuse requires checking the dataset card and the specific trace.
trace-commons.privacy_note: Trace Commons documents best-effort anonymization and explicitly says traces are not guaranteed to be free of personal information. Fetched at runtime; contents are not vendored.

assayo.license_note: Assayo/web-research-trajectories is CC-BY-4.0 (see the dataset's LICENSE-DATA). One judged trajectory (wr-001) is used for the demo; attribution: Assayo.
assayo.privacy_note: A small hand-built gold trajectory (web search + page reads). Fetched at runtime; contents are not vendored.
